manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.
manifest.changelog: Initial Cloudron community release.
manifest.postInstallMessage: Diamond Scheduler is ready. Set VITE_KEYCLOAK_URL, VITE_KEYCLOAK_REALM, and VITE_KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_ID in the app's environment variables, then restart.

manifest.title: Diamond Scheduler

manifest.description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.
